title: Bunny Market
content:
**Scrandle** is a viral sensation that blends the internet's love for **footy scrans**, guessing challenges, and fun foodie vibes.

## What's Scrandle Game?

Scrandle is a fun **food guessing game** inspired by football fans' obsession with matchday meals - also known as **football scrans**. It's all about crowd-sourced votes and community reviews.

## Gameplay

In Scrandle, you're presented with two different stadium food photos and must **guess which one has a higher rating**. Think "Hot or Not" meets "Wordle" - but with delicious stadium grub!

## How To Play Scrandle Game Online?

Scrandle is playable at `scrandle.org` - no download, no sign-up, just pure browser-based fun. It's mobile-friendly and 100% free.

### Steps-By-Step To Play Scrandle Online:

1. **Visit Scrandle website** - Head to [https://scrandle.org/](https://scrandle.org/)
2. **See the Scran Showdown** - Two dishes from different football stadiums with photos
3. **Make Your Guess** - Choose the food "higher rated" by the community
4. **Get Instant Feedback** - See the ratings
5. **Keep Your Streak Alive** - Build your longest streak (one wrong guess ends it)

## Tips & Tricks

- **Look closely at presentation** - Cleaner, cheesier, more loaded dishes tend to rate higher
- **Know your stadiums** - Some are famous for food, others... not so much
- **Play Scrandle daily** - New "Scrands" added regularly
- **Think like a fan** - Ratings come from real matchday experiences

## Why Play Scrandle?

- **Unique gameplay** - It's a culture game, not just food
- **Football + Food** - Dive into the world of "footy scrans"
- **Play Anywhere** - Mobile and desktop, no install needed
- **New Challenges Daily** - Fresh "Scrands" updated regularly
- **Sharpen your Guessing Skills** - Like "Wordle", but delicious

## Related Games

If you enjoy Scrandle Game, you might also like:

- [Foodle](https://foodle.com) - Food-themed Wordle spin-off
- [Waffle](https://wafflegame.net) - Word twist game
- [GeoGuessr: Food Edition](https://geoguessr.com) - Guess global street food locations

## Ready To Play Scrandle Game?

[Play Scrandle Game Online now at https://scrandle.org/](https://scrandle.org/) - where football scrans meet **guessing game** greatness!

title: Racing Speed
content:
# Racing Speed

体验 **极速赛车** 的刺激与快感！在这个充满挑战的赛车游戏中，你将驾驶各种高性能赛车，在精心设计的赛道上展现你的驾驶技巧。

## 游戏亮点

- 🏎️ **真实物理**：基于真实物理引擎的驾驶体验
- 🛣️ **多样赛道**：城市街道、山地公路、专业赛道
- 🚗 **丰富车型**：从跑车到超级跑车的完整车型库
- 🏆 **竞技模式**：与全球玩家在线竞技

从初学者到专业车手，每个玩家都能找到适合自己的挑战！

metadata.title: Racing Speed

title: Strategy Empire
content:
# Strategy Empire

在 **Strategy Empire** 中，你将从一个小的定居点开始，逐步建立强大的帝国，征服整个世界！

## 游戏概述

这是一个深度策略游戏，结合了城市建设、资源管理、军事征服和外交谈判等多种元素。每个决策都会影响你的帝国发展，考验你的战略思维和资源管理能力。

### 核心玩法

- 🏗️ **城市建设**：规划城市布局，建设各种建筑
- 📊 **资源管理**：管理食物、木材、石头、黄金等资源
- ⚔️ **军事征服**：训练军队，征服其他文明
- 🤝 **外交谈判**：与其他文明建立联盟或贸易关系
- 🧭 **科技发展**：研究新技术，提升文明水平

metadata.title: Strategy Empire
